x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Modified OOB fields (renamed labels, changed mandatory rules) can cause Now Assist to reference field names that do not match what agents see, leading to confusing or incorrect AI suggestions.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Review overridden incident fields via sys_dictionary_override. Ensure field labels visible to agents match what Now Assist references in AI suggestions. Document any renamed fields for the Now Assist configuration team.
